---
title: "AI for Public Policy Directory"
subtitle: "A searchable catalog of AI tools, dashboards, and projects built for public policy"
page-layout: full
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

library(yaml)

projects <- yaml::read_yaml("_data/projects.yml")

# Define category order
category_order <- c("Visualisations", "Analytical Tools", "AI Reports", "Admin Tools", "Other")

# Group projects by category
grouped <- list()
for (p in projects) {
  cat_name <- if (is.null(p$category) || !(p$category %in% category_order)) "Other" else p$category
  if (is.null(grouped[[cat_name]])) grouped[[cat_name]] <- list()
  grouped[[cat_name]] <- c(grouped[[cat_name]], list(p))
}

# Build all HTML
html_parts <- character(0)

# Category filter bar
html_parts <- c(html_parts, '<div class="directory-container">')
html_parts <- c(html_parts, '<div class="search-section">')
html_parts <- c(html_parts, '  <input type="text" id="search-input" placeholder="Search projects by name or description..." />')
html_parts <- c(html_parts, '  <div class="category-filters">')
html_parts <- c(html_parts, '    <button class="category-btn active" data-category="all">All</button>')
for (cat in category_order) {
  if (!is.null(grouped[[cat]])) {
    html_parts <- c(html_parts, sprintf('    <button class="category-btn" data-category="%s">%s</button>', cat, cat))
  }
}
html_parts <- c(html_parts, '  </div>')
html_parts <- c(html_parts, '  <div id="tag-filters" class="tag-filters"></div>')
html_parts <- c(html_parts, '  <p class="result-count"><span id="result-count"></span> projects</p>')
html_parts <- c(html_parts, '</div>')

# Render each category section
for (cat in category_order) {
  if (is.null(grouped[[cat]])) next

  html_parts <- c(html_parts, sprintf('<div class="category-section" data-category="%s">', cat))
  html_parts <- c(html_parts, sprintf('  <h2 class="category-heading">%s</h2>', cat))
  html_parts <- c(html_parts, '  <div class="project-grid">')

  for (p in grouped[[cat]]) {
    tags_html <- paste(
      sapply(p$tags, function(t) {
        sprintf('<span class="tag" data-tag="%s">%s</span>', t, t)
      }),
      collapse = ""
    )

    html_parts <- c(html_parts, sprintf(
      '    <div class="project-card" data-tags="%s" data-category="%s">
      <h3 class="project-name"><a href="%s" target="_blank" rel="noopener">%s</a></h3>
      <p class="project-desc">%s</p>
      <div class="project-tags">%s</div>
    </div>',
      paste(p$tags, collapse = ","), cat, p$url, p$name, p$description, tags_html
    ))
  }

  html_parts <- c(html_parts, '  </div>')
  html_parts <- c(html_parts, '</div>')
}

html_parts <- c(html_parts, '</div>')
html_parts <- c(html_parts, '<script src="search.js"></script>')

cat(paste0('\n\n```{=html}\n', paste(html_parts, collapse = "\n"), '\n```\n\n'))
```
